22. 用户controller

22.1. 模拟用户注册

URL: /api/user/guestRegist

Type: POST

Content-Type: application/x-www-form-urlencoded;charset=utf-8

Description: 模拟用户注册

Query-parameters:

Parameter Type Description Required Since

inviteCode

string

No comments found.

false

-

mainCoinId

int32

No comments found.

false

-

advertiseType

enum

facebook -(0,facebook,true,false,true)
googleplay -(1,googleplay,false,false,false)
kwaiq -(2,kwaiq,true,true,true)
tiktok -(3,tiktok,true,true,true)
ios -(4,ios,false,false,false)

false

-

advertiseData

string

No comments found.

false

-

Request-example:

curl -X POST -i /api/user/guestRegist --data 'advertiseData=07jm42&inviteCode=66040&mainCoinId=228&advertiseType=facebook'

Response-fields:

Field Type Description Since

code

int32

结果编码

-

success

boolean

是否成功

-

data

object

结果数据

-

└─userId

int64

用户id

-

└─agentString

string

代理字符串

-

└─agentLength

int32

代理长度

-

└─token

string

token

-

└─hasUserBank

boolean

是否有绑定银行卡

-

└─newUser

boolean

是否是新用户

-

└─inviteCode

string

邀请码

-

└─addTgAuthInfoSuccess

boolean

增加飞机授权是否成功，登录并增加飞机授权信息用到

-

total

int32

总数量

-

message

string

请求错误信息

-

Response-example:

{
  "code": 290,
  "success": true,
  "data": {
    "userId": 973,
    "agentString": "qly1j6",
    "agentLength": 629,
    "token": "ev68s7",
    "hasUserBank": true,
    "newUser": true,
    "inviteCode": "66040",
    "addTgAuthInfoSuccess": true
  },
  "total": 902,
  "message": "success"
}

22.2. 落地页归因上报接口

URL: /api/user/reportAttribution

Type: POST

Content-Type: application/x-www-form-urlencoded;charset=utf-8

Description: 落地页归因上报接口

Query-parameters:

Parameter Type Description Required Since

fbc

string

No comments found.

false

-

fbp

string

No comments found.

false

-

pixelId

string

No comments found.

false

-

ua

string

No comments found.

false

-

inviteCode

string

No comments found.

false

-

Request-example:

curl -X POST -i /api/user/reportAttribution --data 'inviteCode=66040&pixelId=174&fbp=2dw6xk&fbc=lf1af1&ua=37xbmz'

Response-fields:

Field Type Description Since

code

int32

结果编码

-

success

boolean

是否成功

-

data

object

结果数据

-

total

int32

总数量

-

message

string

请求错误信息

-

Response-example:

{
  "code": 583,
  "success": true,
  "total": 270,
  "message": "success"
}

22.3. 通过邮箱注册

URL: /api/user/emailRegist

Type: POST

Content-Type: application/x-www-form-urlencoded;charset=utf-8

Description: 通过邮箱注册

Query-parameters:

Parameter Type Description Required Since

country

enum

国家(See: 国家)

false

-

mobile

string

手机号

false

-

username

string

用户名

false

-

nickname

string

昵称

false

-

email

string

邮箱

true

-

password

string

密码

false

-

mainCoinId

int32

用户的主币种

false

-

birthday

int32

生日

false

-

captchaVcodeKey

string

图片验证码的KEY，如果注册的验证码使用默认的图片验证码

false

-

vcode

string

验证码

false

-

inviteCode

string

邀请码

false

-

fp

string

浏览器指纹

false

-

deviceId

string

设备ID

false

-

appSign

string

设备ID签名

false

-

htoken

string

Hcapache的token

false

-

advertiseType

enum

广告类型(See: 广告类型 上报)

false

-

advertiseData

string

广告信息

false

-

reportAttribution

boolean

是否自建归因

false

-

method

string

No comments found.

false

-

headerNames

object

No comments found.

false

-

trailerFields

map

No comments found.

false

object

curl -X POST -i /api/user/emailRegist --data 'reader.skipLF=true&queryString=q5md3p&asyncContext.request.servletContext.sessionTimeout=969&contentLength=641&remotePort=131&asyncContext.timeout=66&servletContext.sessionTimeout=69&session.servletContext.majorVersion=696&asyncContext.request.servletContext.effectiveMajorVersion=490&asyncContext.request.reader.nChars=655&servletContext.contextPath=d8di4d&serverPort=367&servletContext.effectiveMinorVersion=92&captchaVcodeKey=9kyo27&reader.cb=4&reader.cb=4&nickname=bethanie.boyle&asyncSupported=true&asyncContext.request.remotePort=959&asyncContext.request.remoteHost=6goj7q&servletContext.servletContextName=sirena.block&servletContext.sessionCookieConfig.comment=5gmkbs&vcode=66040&pathInfo=oth3s2&session.servletContext.minorVersion=457&reader.nChars=558&session.creationTime=1782209243377&characterEncoding=p879tx&servletContext.serverInfo=yh88va&httpServletMapping.pattern=f9daho&httpServletMapping.mappingMatch=CONTEXT_ROOT&asyncContext.request.servletContext.serverInfo=rsktrr&asyncContext.request.asyncSupported=true&asyncContext.request.contentType=08fvzo&requestURL.value=83&requestURL.value=83&username=sirena.block&asyncContext.response.writer.trouble=true&servletContext.minorVersion=389&reader.readAheadLimit=10&contentType=0x4l1i&session.servletContext.contextPath=rg8nj3&reader.nextChar=746&asyncContext.request.characterEncoding=grumjj&asyncContext.request.localPort=122&servletContext.effectiveMajorVersion=206&session.servletContext.responseCharacterEncoding=hqh5hp&asyncContext.request.reader.markedChar=158&userPrincipal.name=sirena.block&asyncContext.request.servletContext.responseCharacterEncoding=pc9980&asyncContext.request.localName=sirena.block&asyncContext.response.committed=true&asyncContext.request.remoteAddr=s3brhh&servletPath=iqusnx&requestedSessionIdFromUrl=true&asyncStarted=true&email=joan.bogan@yahoo.com&servletContext.sessionCookieConfig.httpOnly=true&htoken=sx9cqj&requestURL.empty=true&httpServletMapping.servletName=sirena.block&asyncContext.request.s Response-fields:

Field Type Description Since

code

int32

结果编码

-

success

boolean

是否成功

-

data

object

结果数据

-

└─userId

int64

用户id

-

└─agentString

string

代理字符串

-

└─agentLength

int32

代理长度

-

└─token

string

token

-

└─hasUserBank

boolean

是否有绑定银行卡

-

└─newUser

boolean

是否是新用户

-

└─inviteCode

string

邀请码

-

└─addTgAuthInfoSuccess

boolean

增加飞机授权是否成功，登录并增加飞机授权信息用到

-

total

int32

总数量

-

message

string

请求错误信息

-

Response-example:

{
  "code": 982,
  "success": true,
  "data": {
    "userId": 153,
    "agentString": "cop6nl",
    "agentLength": 354,
    "token": "hzaqep",
    "hasUserBank": true,
    "newUser": true,
    "inviteCode": "66040",
    "addTgAuthInfoSuccess": true
  },
  "total": 210,
  "message": "success"
}

22.4. 通过手机号注册

URL: /api/user/mobileRegist

Type: POST

Content-Type: application/x-www-form-urlencoded;charset=utf-8

Description: 通过手机号注册

Query-parameters:

Parameter Type Description Required Since

country

enum

国家(See: 国家)

false

-

mobile

string

手机号

false

-

username

string

用户名

false

-

nickname

string

昵称

false

-

password

string

密码

false

-

mainCoinId

int32

用户的主币种

false

-

birthday

int32

生日

false

-

captchaVcodeKey

string

图片验证码的KEY，如果注册的验证码使用默认的图片验证码

false

-

vcode

string

验证码

false

-

inviteCode

string

邀请码

false

-

fp

string

浏览器指纹

false

-

deviceId

string

设备ID

false

-

appSign

string

设备ID签名

false

-

htoken

string

Hcapache的token

false

-

advertiseType

enum

广告类型(See: 广告类型 上报)

false

-

advertiseData

string

广告信息

false

-

reportAttribution

boolean

是否自建归因

false

string

false

Response-fields:

Field Type Description Since

code

int32

结果编码

-

success

boolean

是否成功

-

data

object

结果数据

-

└─userId

int64

用户id

-

└─agentString

string

代理字符串

-

└─agentLength

int32

代理长度

-

└─token

string

token

-

└─hasUserBank

boolean

是否有绑定银行卡

-

└─newUser

boolean

是否是新用户

-

└─inviteCode

string

邀请码

-

└─addTgAuthInfoSuccess

boolean

增加飞机授权是否成功，登录并增加飞机授权信息用到

-

total

int32

总数量

-

message

string

请求错误信息

-

Response-example:

{
  "code": 505,
  "success": true,
  "data": {
    "userId": 929,
    "agentString": "kwmrxk",
    "agentLength": 223,
    "token": "qvvw7e",
    "hasUserBank": true,
    "newUser": true,
    "inviteCode": "66040",
    "addTgAuthInfoSuccess": true
  },
  "total": 70,
  "message": "success"
}

22.5. 用户登录

URL: /api/user/login

Type: POST

Content-Type: application/x-www-form-urlencoded;charset=utf-8

Description: 用户登录

Query-parameters:

Parameter Type Description Required Since

mobileOrUsernameOrEmail

string

用户名或手机号或邮箱

true

-

password

string

密码

true

-

captchaVcodeKey

string

验证码的KEY

true

-

vcode

string

验证码

true

-

Request-example:

curl -X POST -i /api/user/login --data 'mobileOrUsernameOrEmail=joan.bogan@yahoo.com&captchaVcodeKey=jzu5zc&password=tkenc5&vcode=66040'

Response-fields:

Field Type Description Since

code

int32

结果编码

-

success

boolean

是否成功

-

data

object

结果数据

-

└─userId

int64

用户id

-

└─agentString

string

代理字符串

-

└─agentLength

int32

代理长度

-

└─token

string

token

-

└─hasUserBank

boolean

是否有绑定银行卡

-

└─newUser

boolean

是否是新用户

-

└─inviteCode

string

邀请码

-

└─addTgAuthInfoSuccess

boolean

增加飞机授权是否成功，登录并增加飞机授权信息用到

-

total

int32

总数量

-

message

string

请求错误信息

-

Response-example:

{
  "code": 510,
  "success": true,
  "data": {
    "userId": 233,
    "agentString": "iu6g3g",
    "agentLength": 553,
    "token": "x08qjr",
    "hasUserBank": true,
    "newUser": true,
    "inviteCode": "66040",
    "addTgAuthInfoSuccess": true
  },
  "total": 760,
  "message": "success"
}

22.6. 用户登录并绑定telegram授权信息

URL: /api/user/loginAndBindTgAuthInfo

Type: POST

Content-Type: application/json; charset=utf-8

Description: 用户登录并绑定telegram授权信息

Body-parameters:

Parameter Type Description Required Since

userLogin

object

登录数据

false

-

└─mobileOrUsernameOrEmail

string

用户名或手机号或邮箱

true

-

└─password

string

密码

true

-

└─captchaVcodeKey

string

验证码的KEY

true

-

└─vcode

string

验证码

true

-

telegramInitData

object

飞机数据

false

-

└─initData

string

No comments found.

false

-

└─telegramWebAppInitData

object

No comments found.

false

-

     └─query_id

string

Optional. A unique identifier for the Mini App session, required for sending
messages via the answerWebAppQuery method.

false

-

     └─user

object

Optional. An object containing data about the current user.

false

-

          └─id

int64

A unique identifier for the user or bot. This number may have more than 32
significant bits and some programming languages may have difficulty/silent
defects in interpreting it. It has at most 52 significant bits, so a 64-bit
integer or a double-precision float type is safe for storing this identifier.

false

-

          └─is_bot

boolean

Optional. True, if this user is a bot. Returns in the receiver field only.

false

-

          └─first_name

string

First name of the user or bot.

false

-

          └─last_name

string

Optional. Last name of the user or bot.

false

-

          └─username

string

Optional. Username of the user or bot.

false

-

          └─language_code

string

Optional. IETF language tag of the user's language. Returns in user field
only.

false

-

          └─is_premium

boolean

Optional. True, if this user is a Telegram Premium user.

false

-

          └─added_to_attachment_menu

boolean

Optional. True, if this user added the bot to the attachment menu.

false

-

          └─allows_write_to_pm

boolean

Optional. True, if this user allowed the bot to message them.

false

-

          └─photo_url

string

Optional. URL of the user’s profile photo. The photo can be in .jpeg or .svg
formats. Only returned for Mini Apps launched from the attachment menu.

false

-

     └─receiver

object

Optional. An object containing data about the chat partner of the current
user in the chat where the bot was launched via the attachment menu. Returned
only for private chats and only for Mini Apps launched via the attachment
menu.

false

-

          └─id

int64

A unique identifier for the user or bot. This number may have more than 32
significant bits and some programming languages may have difficulty/silent
defects in interpreting it. It has at most 52 significant bits, so a 64-bit
integer or a double-precision float type is safe for storing this identifier.

false

-

          └─is_bot

boolean

Optional. True, if this user is a bot. Returns in the receiver field only.

false

-

          └─first_name

string

First name of the user or bot.

false

-

          └─last_name

string

Optional. Last name of the user or bot.

false

-

          └─username

string

Optional. Username of the user or bot.

false

-

          └─language_code

string

Optional. IETF language tag of the user's language. Returns in user field
only.

false

-

          └─is_premium

boolean

Optional. True, if this user is a Telegram Premium user.

false

-

          └─added_to_attachment_menu

boolean

Optional. True, if this user added the bot to the attachment menu.

false

-

          └─allows_write_to_pm

boolean

Optional. True, if this user allowed the bot to message them.

false

-

          └─photo_url

string

Optional. URL of the user’s profile photo. The photo can be in .jpeg or .svg
formats. Only returned for Mini Apps launched from the attachment menu.

false

-

     └─chat

object

Optional. An object containing data about the chat where the bot was launched
via the attachment menu. Returned for supergroups, channels and group chats –
only for Mini Apps launched via the attachment menu.

false

-

          └─id

int64

Unique identifier for this chat. This number may have more than 32
significant bits and some programming languages may have difficulty/silent
defects in interpreting it. But it has at most 52 significant bits, so a
signed 64-bit integer or double-precision float type are safe for storing
this identifier.

false

-

          └─type

string

Type of chat, can be either “group”, “supergroup” or “channel”

false

-

          └─title

string

Title of the chat

false

-

          └─username

string

Optional. Username of the chat

false

-

          └─photo_url

string

Optional. URL of the chat’s photo. The photo can be in .jpeg or .svg formats.
Only returned for Mini Apps launched from the attachment menu.

false

-

     └─chat_type

string

Optional. Type of the chat from which the Mini App was opened. Can be either
“sender” for a private chat with the user opening the link, “private”,
“group”, “supergroup”, or “channel”. Returned only for Mini Apps launched
from direct links.

false

-

     └─chat_instance

string

Optional. Global identifier, uniquely corresponding to the chat from which
the Mini App was opened. Returned only for Mini Apps launched from a direct
link.

false

-

     └─start_param

string

Optional. The value of the startattach parameter, passed via link. Only
returned for Mini Apps when launched from the attachment menu via link. The
value of the start_param parameter will also be passed in the GET-parameter
tgWebAppStartParam, so the Mini App can load the correct interface right
away.

false

-

     └─can_send_after

int32

Optional. Time in seconds, after which a message can be sent via the
answerWebAppQuery method.

false

-

     └─auth_date

int32

Unix time when the form was opened.

false

-

     └─hash

string

A hash of all passed parameters, which the bot server can use to check their
validity.

false

-

└─botName

string

No comments found.

false

-

└─inviteCode

string

No comments found.

false

-

└─mainCoinId

int32

No comments found.

false

-

└─fp

string

No comments found.

false

-

└─deviceId

string

No comments found.

false

-

└─appSign

string

No comments found.

false

-

Request-example:

curl -X POST -H 'Content-Type: application/json; charset=utf-8' -i /api/user/loginAndBindTgAuthInfo --data '{
  "userLogin": {
    "mobileOrUsernameOrEmail": "joan.bogan@yahoo.com",
    "password": "o5gyil",
    "captchaVcodeKey": "efa9f3",
    "vcode": "66040"
  },
  "telegramInitData": {
    "initData": "ggzpd2",
    "telegramWebAppInitData": {
      "query_id": "174",
      "user": {
        "id": 955,
        "is_bot": true,
        "first_name": "sirena.block",
        "last_name": "sirena.block",
        "username": "sirena.block",
        "language_code": "66040",
        "is_premium": true,
        "added_to_attachment_menu": true,
        "allows_write_to_pm": true,
        "photo_url": "www.denver-huel.net"
      },
      "receiver": {
        "id": 178,
        "is_bot": true,
        "first_name": "sirena.block",
        "last_name": "sirena.block",
        "username": "sirena.block",
        "language_code": "66040",
        "is_premium": true,
        "added_to_attachment_menu": true,
        "allows_write_to_pm": true,
        "photo_url": "www.denver-huel.net"
      },
      "chat": {
        "id": 534,
        "type": "nu95zz",
        "title": "choeyx",
        "username": "sirena.block",
        "photo_url": "www.denver-huel.net"
      },
      "chat_type": "2iwyan",
      "chat_instance": "5a90rw",
      "start_param": "hvom77",
      "can_send_after": 453,
      "auth_date": 634,
      "hash": "oxodi5"
    },
    "botName": "sirena.block",
    "inviteCode": "66040",
    "mainCoinId": 84,
    "fp": "aalg71",
    "deviceId": "174",
    "appSign": "gwzg59"
  }
}'

Response-fields:

Field Type Description Since

code

int32

结果编码

-

success

boolean

是否成功

-

data

object

结果数据

-

└─userId

int64

用户id

-

└─agentString

string

代理字符串

-

└─agentLength

int32

代理长度

-

└─token

string

token

-

└─hasUserBank

boolean

是否有绑定银行卡

-

└─newUser

boolean

是否是新用户

-

└─inviteCode

string

邀请码

-

└─addTgAuthInfoSuccess

boolean

增加飞机授权是否成功，登录并增加飞机授权信息用到

-

total

int32

总数量

-

message

string

请求错误信息

-

Response-example:

{
  "code": 110,
  "success": true,
  "data": {
    "userId": 243,
    "agentString": "ns7j1q",
    "agentLength": 832,
    "token": "yvlf87",
    "hasUserBank": true,
    "newUser": true,
    "inviteCode": "66040",
    "addTgAuthInfoSuccess": true
  },
  "total": 718,
  "message": "success"
}

22.7. 代理后台登录后台获取用户基本信息，权限菜单

URL: /api/user/agentLoginSuccess

Type: POST

Content-Type: application/x-www-form-urlencoded;charset=utf-8

Description: 代理后台登录后台获取用户基本信息，权限菜单

Request-example:

curl -X POST -i /api/user/agentLoginSuccess

Response-fields:

Field Type Description Since

code

int32

结果编码

-

success

boolean

是否成功

-

data

object

结果数据

-

└─user

object

用户JWT信息

-

     └─userId

int64

获取用户id

-

     └─username

string

获取用户名

-

└─rights

array

菜单树

-

     └─nameI18nJson

string

权限名称

-

     └─name

string

返回当前语言的名称

-

     └─id

int64

主键

-

     └─parentId

int64

父权限id

-

     └─type

enum

权限类型，分类，菜单，API(See: 权限类型)

-

     └─order

int32

排序

-

     └─uri

string

API类权限的接口地址

-

     └─component

string

前端属性,组件

-

     └─icon

string

前端属性

-

     └─link

string

前端属性

-

     └─key

string

前端属性

-

     └─text

string

前端属性

-

     └─cache

boolean

前端属性

-

     └─fixed

boolean

是否固定

-

     └─items

array

子菜单，构建菜单树用

-

     └─checked

boolean

是否要选中，授权时使用

-

└─webSocketDomains

string

WEBsocket地址

-

└─companyId

int32

公司id

-

total

int32

总数量

-

message

string

请求错误信息

-

Response-example:

{
  "code": 79,
  "success": true,
  "data": {
    "user": {
      "userId": 607,
      "username": "sirena.block"
    },
    "rights": [
      {
        "nameI18nJson": "s0lwlm",
        "name": "sirena.block",
        "id": 616,
        "parentId": 291,
        "type": "folder",
        "order": 948,
        "uri": "i3gtio",
        "component": "o82f9n",
        "icon": "olhr0v",
        "link": "xhe0u7",
        "key": "x7sgae",
        "text": "h46yfy",
        "cache": true,
        "fixed": true,
        "items": [
          {
            "$ref": ".."
          }
        ],
        "checked": true
      }
    ],
    "webSocketDomains": "x25104",
    "companyId": 864
  },
  "total": 344,
  "message": "success"
}

22.8. 后台获取单个用户信息

URL: /api/user/get

Type: POST

Content-Type: application/x-www-form-urlencoded;charset=utf-8

Description: 后台获取单个用户信息

Query-parameters:

Parameter Type Description Required Since

userId

int64

No comments found.

true

-

Request-example:

curl -X POST -i /api/user/get --data 'userId=727'

Response-fields:

Field Type Description Since

code

int32

结果编码

-

success

boolean

是否成功

-

data

object

结果数据

-

└─agentString

string

用户代理阶梯字符串,比如1&2&3&，冗余

-

└─agentLength

int32

代理级别数，比如1&2&3&就是等于3，冗余

-

└─userId

int64

用户id

-

└─test

boolean

是否是测试数据

-

└─companyId

int32

公司id

-

└─uniqueId

string

数据的唯一编码

-

└─plusData

object

用户信息额外追加

-

     └─uniqueId

string

数据的唯一编码

-

     └─username

string

用户名

-

     └─nickname

string

用户昵称

-

     └─mobile

string

手机号

-

     └─email

string

邮箱

-

     └─registTime

int64

注册时间

-

     └─activeTime

int64

活跃时间

-

     └─agent

boolean

是否是代理

-

     └─agentRoleId

int64

用户代理后台的角色id

-

     └─folderId

int64

用户分类id

-

     └─memo

string

用户备注

-

     └─status

enum

用户状态(See: 用户状态枚举)

-

     └─notRequireBet

boolean

是否是无打码要求用户

-

     └─firstRechargeTime

int64

首冲时间

-

     └─firstRechargeCoinId

int64

首冲币种id

-

     └─firstRecharge

number

首冲金额

-

     └─lastRechargeTime

int64

上次充值时间

-

     └─lastRechargeCoinId

int64

上次充值币种id

-

     └─lastRecharge

number

上次充值金额

-

     └─firstWithdrawTime

int64

首次提现时间

-

     └─registIp

string

注册IP，冗余

-

     └─fingerPrint

string

指纹，冗余

-

     └─superUsername

string

上级用户名

-

     └─topUsername

string

总代用户名

-

     └─balanceMap

map

用户余额

-

     └─showBalanceByMc

boolean

是否根据主币种显示用户资产

-

     └─sameIpUsers

int32

同IP用户数

-

     └─fangShua

object

防刷信息

-

          └─sameIps

int32

本人同IP数

-

          └─superSameIps

int32

上线与本人同IP数

-

          └─lowSameIps

int32

下线与本人同IP数

-

          └─superSamePasswords

int32

上线与本人同密码数

-

          └─lowSamePasswords

int32

下线与本人同密码数

-

          └─superRechargeInfo

object

所有上线与本人充值信息

-

          └─lowRechargeInfos

array

所有下线充值信息

-

└─username

string

用户名，冗余

-

└─mobile

string

手机号，冗余

-

└─email

string

邮箱，冗余

-

└─nickname

string

昵称

-

└─birthday

int32

生日

-

└─mainCoinId

int32

用户的主币种

-

└─country

enum

所属国家(See: 国家)

-

└─vipLevel

int32

VIP等级

-

└─status

enum

用户状态(See: 用户状态枚举)

-

└─registTime

int64

注册时间

-

└─registDay

int32

注册日期

-

└─activeTime

int64

上次活跃时间

-

└─joinOfficialChannel

boolean

是否有加入官方频道

-

└─joinBot

boolean

是否有加入机器人

-

└─agent

boolean

是否是代理

-

└─agentRoleId

int64

用户代理后台的角色id

-

└─advertiseAgent

boolean

是否是广告代理

-

└─folderId

int64

所属分类id

-

└─registIp

string

注册IP，冗余

-

└─fingerPrint

string

浏览器指纹，冗余

-

└─deviceId

string

设备ID，冗余，app使用

-

└─memo

string

用户备注

-

└─notRequireBet

boolean

是否是无打码要求用户

-

└─firstRechargeTime

int64

首冲时间

-

└─firstRechargeCoinId

int64

首冲币种id

-

└─firstRecharge

number

首冲金额

-

└─lastRechargeTime

int64

上次充值时间

-

└─lastRechargeCoinId

int64

上次充值币种id

-

└─lastRecharge

number

上次充值金额

-

└─rechargeDayRange

int32

最近充值与首冲的间隔天数

-

└─firstWithdrawTime

int64

首提时间

-

└─firstBetDay

int32

首次投注日期

-

└─avatar

string

头像

-

└─fanshuiSchemaId

int64

返水方案id

-

└─enableDiffCoinInvite

boolean

邀请与本人不同币种的用户是否要强制算有效

-

└─propsJson

string

其他扩展属性

-

└─teamUsers

int64

团队人数

-

└─teamFirstRechargeUsers

int64

团队首冲人数

-

└─teamFirstRecharge

number

团队首冲金额

-

└─teamRecharge

number

团队总充值金额

-

└─teamInviteGift

number

团队邀请奖励

-

└─level1Users

int64

直属人数

-

└─level1FirstRechargeUsers

int64

直属首冲人数

-

└─level1FirstRecharge

number

直属首冲金额

-

└─level1Recharge

number

直属总充值金额

-

└─level1InviteGift

number

直属邀请奖励

-

└─hasPayPassword

boolean

是否有支付密码

-

└─superUsername

string

上级用户名

-

└─topUsername

string

总代用户名

-

└─disableVenues

array

该用户的禁用场馆的IntValue集合

-

total

int32

总数量

-

message

string

请求错误信息

-

Response-example:

{
  "code": 834,
  "success": true,
  "data": {
    "agentString": "um2fju",
    "agentLength": 452,
    "userId": 924,
    "test": true,
    "companyId": 376,
    "uniqueId": "174",
    "plusData": {
      "uniqueId": "174",
      "username": "sirena.block",
      "nickname": "bethanie.boyle",
      "mobile": "1-641-937-2561",
      "email": "joan.bogan@yahoo.com",
      "registTime": 1782209243377,
      "activeTime": 1782209243377,
      "agent": true,
      "agentRoleId": 645,

      "memo": "uor46d",
      "status": "enable",

      "firstRechargeTime": 1782209243377,

      "firstRecharge": 202,

      "lastRechargeCoinId": 63,
      "lastRecharge": 163,
      "firstWithdrawTime": 1782209243377,
      "registIp": "106.213.67.107",
      "fingerPrint": "uv6f2r",
      "superUsername": "sirena.block",
      "topUsername": "sirena.block",
      "balanceMap": {
        "mapKey": 495
      },
      "showBalanceByMc": true,
      "sameIpUsers": 695,
      "fangShua": {
        "sameIps": 586,
        "superSameIps": 216,
        "lowSameIps": 378,

        "lowSamePasswords": 585,
        "superRechargeInfo": {
          "$ref": "..."
        },
        "lowRechargeInfos": [
          {
            "$ref": "..."
          }
        ]
      }
    },
    "username": "sirena.block",
    "mobile": "1-641-937-2561",
    "email": "joan.bogan@yahoo.com",
    "nickname": "bethanie.boyle",
    "birthday": 242,
    "mainCoinId": 673,
    "country": "brazil",
    "vipLevel": 906,
    "status": "enable",
    "registTime": 1782209243377,
    "registDay": 448,
    "activeTime": 1782209243377,
    "joinOfficialChannel": true,
    "joinBot": true,
    "agent": true,

    "advertiseAgent": true,
    "folderId": 428,
    "registIp": "106.213.67.107",
    "fingerPrint": "rm9ky9",
    "deviceId": "174",
    "memo": "bf1b6i",
    "notRequireBet": true,
    "firstRechargeTime": 1782209243377,
    "firstRechargeCoinId": 720,
    "firstRecharge": 708,
    "lastRechargeTime": 1782209243377,

    "lastRecharge": 630,
    "rechargeDayRange": 37,
    "firstWithdrawTime": 1782209243377,
    "firstBetDay": 276,
    "avatar": "8piisg",
    "fanshuiSchemaId": 600,
    "enableDiffCoinInvite": true,
    "propsJson": "v7zie9",
    "teamUsers": 689,
    "teamFirstRechargeUsers": 988,
    "teamFirstRecharge": 944,
    "teamRecharge": 299,
    "teamInviteGift": 521,

    "level1FirstRechargeUsers": 506,
    "level1FirstRecharge": 940,
    "level1Recharge": 893,

  "total": 189,

22.9. 前台获取用户信息

URL: /api/user/frontGet

Type: POST

Content-Type: application/x-www-form-urlencoded;charset=utf-8

Description: 前台获取用户信息

Query-parameters:

Parameter Type Description Required Since

userId

int64

No comments found.

false

-

Request-example:

curl -X POST -i /api/user/frontGet --data 'userId=853'

Response-fields:

Field Type Description Since

code

int32

结果编码

-

success

boolean

是否成功

-

data

object

结果数据

-

└─agentString

string

用户代理阶梯字符串,比如1&2&3&，冗余

-

└─agentLength

int32

代理级别数，比如1&2&3&就是等于3，冗余

-

└─userId

int64

用户id

-

└─test

boolean

是否是测试数据

-

└─companyId

int32

公司id

-

└─uniqueId

string

数据的唯一编码

-

└─plusData

object

用户信息额外追加

-

     └─uniqueId

string

数据的唯一编码

-

     └─username

string

用户名

-

     └─nickname

-

-

     └─agent

是否是代理

-

int64

object

本人同IP数

-

└─folderId

int64

所属分类id

-

└─registIp

string

注册IP，冗余

-

└─fingerPrint

string

浏览器指纹，冗余

-

└─deviceId

string

设备ID，冗余，app使用

-

└─memo

string

用户备注

-

└─notRequireBet

boolean

是否是无打码要求用户

-

└─firstRechargeTime

int64

首冲时间

-

└─firstRechargeCoinId

int64

首冲币种id

-

└─firstRecharge

number

首冲金额

-

└─lastRechargeTime

int64

上次充值时间

-

└─lastRechargeCoinId

int64

上次充值币种id

-

└─lastRecharge

number

上次充值金额

-

└─rechargeDayRange

int32

最近充值与首冲的间隔天数

-

└─firstWithdrawTime

int64

首提时间

-

└─firstBetDay

int32

首次投注日期

-

└─avatar

string

头像

-

└─fanshuiSchemaId

int64

返水方案id

-

└─enableDiffCoinInvite

boolean

邀请与本人不同币种的用户是否要强制算有效

-

└─propsJson

string

其他扩展属性

-

└─teamUsers

int64

团队人数

-

└─teamFirstRechargeUsers

int64

团队首冲人数

-

└─teamFirstRecharge

number

团队首冲金额

-

└─teamRecharge

number

团队总充值金额

-

└─teamInviteGift

number

团队邀请奖励

-

└─level1Users

int64

直属人数

-

└─level1FirstRechargeUsers

int64

直属首冲人数

-

└─level1FirstRecharge

number

直属首冲金额

-

└─level1Recharge

number

直属总充值金额

-

└─level1InviteGift

number

直属邀请奖励

-

└─hasPayPassword

boolean

是否有支付密码

-

└─superUsername

string

上级用户名

-

└─topUsername

string

总代用户名

-

└─disableVenues

array

该用户的禁用场馆的IntValue集合

-

total

int32

总数量

-

message

string

请求错误信息

-

Response-example:

{
  "code": 428,
  "success": true,
  "data": {
    "agentString": "093tz7",
    "agentLength": 220,
    "userId": 54,
    "test": true,
    "companyId": 927,
    "uniqueId": "174",
    "plusData": {
      "uniqueId": "174",
      "username": "sirena.block",
      "nickname": "bethanie.boyle",
      "mobile": "1-641-937-2561",
      "email": "joan.bogan@yahoo.com",

      "activeTime": 1782209243377,

      },

          "$ref": "..."
        },

          {
            "$ref": "..."
          }
        ]
      }
    },

    "email": "joan.bogan@yahoo.com",

22.10. 查询用户

URL: /api/user/query

Type: POST

Content-Type: application/x-www-form-urlencoded;charset=utf-8

Description: 查询用户

Query-parameters:

Parameter Type Description Required Since

limit

int32

每页条数

false

-

page

int32

第几页

false

-

agentId

int64

代理id

false

-

lowLength

int32

下级级别

false

-

timeZone

enum

时区，报表不支持，仅数据列表，前端传minDay,maxDay,day支持(See: 时区枚举)

false

-

companyId

int32

公司id

false

-

userId

int64

用户id

false

-

test

boolean

是否是测试数据

false

-

username

string

用户名

false

-

email

string

邮箱

false

-

mobile

string

手机号

false

-

birthday

int32

生日

false

-

password

string

密码

false

-

minRegistTime

int64

最小注册时间戳

false

-

maxRegistTime

int64

最大注册时间戳

false

-

minFirstRechargeTime

int64

最小首冲时间戳

false

-

maxFirstRechargeTime

int64

最大首冲时间戳

false

-

minLastRechargeTime

int64

最小上次充值时间戳

false

-

maxLastRechargeTime

int64

最大上次充值时间戳

false

-

minActiveTime

int64

最小活跃时间戳

false

-

maxActiveTime

int64

最大活跃时间戳

false

-

minRetentionDays

int32

最小留存天数

false

-

status

enum

用户状态(See: 用户状态枚举)

false

-

online

boolean

是否在线

false

-

vipLevel

int32

用户VIP等级

false

-

minVipLevel

int32

最小用户VIP等级

false

-

agent

boolean

是否是代理

false

-

advertiseAgent

boolean

是否是广告代理

false

-

folderId

int64

用户分类id

false

-

registIp

string

注册IP

false

-

notRequireBet

boolean

是否是无打码要求用户

false

-

joinOfficialChannel

boolean

是否加入官方频道

false

-

joinBot

boolean

是否加入机器人

false

-

inviteCode

string

邀请码

false

-

userIds

array

用户id集合

false

-

companyIds

array

公司id集合

false

-

Request-example:

curl -X POST -i /api/user/query --data 'countDistinctColumns=6gm2wu&countDistinctColumns=6gm2wu&password=x6sq88&maxRegistTime=1782209243377&online=true&vipLevel=343¬RequireBet=true&agent=true&page=1&maxFirstRechargeTime=1782209243377&maxLastRechargeTime=1782209243377&minVipLevel=577&status=enable&groupByColumns=kfm9jv&groupByColumns=kfm9jv&maxActiveTime=1782209243377&minFirstRechargeTime=1782209243377&userId=480&advertiseAgent=true&agentId=434&test=true&lowLength=561&mobile=1-641-937-2561&minRegistTime=1782209243377&minRetentionDays=742&minLastRechargeTime=1782209243377&companyId=7&inviteCode=66040&joinOfficialChannel=true&username=sirena.block&folderId=938®istIp=106.213.67.107&minActiveTime=1782209243377&joinBot=true&birthday=879&email=joan.bogan@yahoo.com&timeZone=utc0&limit=10'

Response-fields:

Field Type Description Since

code

int32

结果编码

-

success

boolean

是否成功

-

data

array

结果数据

-

└─agentString

string

用户代理阶梯字符串,比如1&2&3&，冗余

-

└─agentLength

int32

代理级别数，比如1&2&3&就是等于3，冗余

-

└─userId

int64

用户id

-

└─test

boolean

是否是测试数据

-

└─companyId

int32

公司id

-

└─uniqueId

string

数据的唯一编码

-

└─plusData

object

用户信息额外追加

-

     └─uniqueId

string

数据的唯一编码

-

     └─username

string

用户名

-

     └─nickname

string

用户昵称

-

     └─mobile

string

手机号

-

     └─email

string

邮箱

-

     └─registTime

int64

注册时间

-

     └─activeTime

int64

活跃时间

-

     └─agent

boolean

是否是代理

-

     └─agentRoleId

int64

用户代理后台的角色id

-

     └─folderId

int64

用户分类id

-

     └─memo

string

用户备注

-

     └─status

enum

用户状态(See: 用户状态枚举)

-

     └─notRequireBet

boolean

是否是无打码要求用户

-

     └─firstRechargeTime

int64

首冲时间

-

     └─firstRechargeCoinId

int64

首冲币种id

-

     └─firstRecharge

number

首冲金额

-

     └─lastRechargeTime

int64

上次充值时间

-

     └─lastRechargeCoinId

int64

上次充值币种id

-

     └─lastRecharge

number

上次充值金额

-

     └─firstWithdrawTime

int64

首次提现时间

-

     └─registIp

string

注册IP，冗余

-

     └─fingerPrint

string

指纹，冗余

-

     └─superUsername

string

上级用户名

-

     └─topUsername

string

总代用户名

-

     └─balanceMap

map

用户余额

-

     └─showBalanceByMc

boolean

是否根据主币种显示用户资产

-

     └─sameIpUsers

int32

同IP用户数

-

     └─fangShua

object

防刷信息

-

          └─sameIps

int32

本人同IP数

-

          └─superSameIps

int32

上线与本人同IP数

-

          └─lowSameIps

int32

下线与本人同IP数

-

          └─superSamePasswords

int32

上线与本人同密码数

-

          └─lowSamePasswords

int32

下线与本人同密码数

-

          └─superRechargeInfo

object

所有上线与本人充值信息

-

          └─lowRechargeInfos

array

所有下线充值信息

-

└─username

string

用户名，冗余

-

└─mobile

string

手机号，冗余

-

└─email

string

邮箱，冗余

-

└─nickname

string

昵称

-

└─birthday

int32

生日

-

└─mainCoinId

int32

用户的主币种

-

└─country

enum

所属国家(See: 国家)

-

└─vipLevel

int32

VIP等级

-

└─status

enum

用户状态(See: 用户状态枚举)

-

└─registTime

int64

注册时间

-

└─registDay

int32

注册日期

-

└─activeTime

int64

上次活跃时间

-

└─joinOfficialChannel

boolean

是否有加入官方频道

-

└─joinBot

boolean

是否有加入机器人

-

└─agent

boolean

是否是代理

-

└─agentRoleId

int64

用户代理后台的角色id

-

└─advertiseAgent

boolean

是否是广告代理

-

└─folderId

int64

所属分类id

-

└─registIp

string

注册IP，冗余

-

└─fingerPrint

string

浏览器指纹，冗余

-

└─deviceId

string

设备ID，冗余，app使用

-

└─memo

string

用户备注

-

└─notRequireBet

boolean

是否是无打码要求用户

-

└─firstRechargeTime

int64

首冲时间

-

└─firstRechargeCoinId

int64

首冲币种id

-

└─firstRecharge

number

首冲金额

-

└─lastRechargeTime

int64

上次充值时间

-

└─lastRechargeCoinId

int64

上次充值币种id

-

└─lastRecharge

number

上次充值金额

-

└─rechargeDayRange

int32

最近充值与首冲的间隔天数

-

└─firstWithdrawTime

int64

首提时间

-

└─firstBetDay

int32

首次投注日期

-

└─avatar

string

头像

-

└─fanshuiSchemaId

int64

返水方案id

-

└─enableDiffCoinInvite

boolean

邀请与本人不同币种的用户是否要强制算有效

-

└─propsJson

string

其他扩展属性

-

└─teamUsers

int64

团队人数

-

└─teamFirstRechargeUsers

int64

团队首冲人数

-

└─teamFirstRecharge

number

团队首冲金额

-

└─teamRecharge

number

团队总充值金额

-

└─teamInviteGift

number

团队邀请奖励

-

└─level1Users

int64

直属人数

-

└─level1FirstRechargeUsers

int64

直属首冲人数

-

└─level1FirstRecharge

number

直属首冲金额

-

└─level1Recharge

number

直属总充值金额

-

└─level1InviteGift

number

直属邀请奖励

-

└─hasPayPassword

boolean

是否有支付密码

-

└─superUsername

string

上级用户名

-

└─topUsername

string

总代用户名

-

└─disableVenues

array

该用户的禁用场馆的IntValue集合

-

total

int32

总数量

-

message

string

请求错误信息

-

{
  "code": 674,

22.11. 前台用户修改密码

URL: /api/user/updatePassword

Type: POST

Content-Type: application/x-www-form-urlencoded;charset=utf-8

Description: 前台用户修改密码

Query-parameters:

Parameter Type Description Required Since

newPassword

string

No comments found.

true

-

Request-example:

curl -X POST -i /api/user/updatePassword --data 'newPassword=aj1e0f'

Response-fields:

Field Type Description Since

code

int32

结果编码

-

success

boolean

是否成功

-

data

object

结果数据

-

total

int32

总数量

-

message

string

请求错误信息

-

Response-example:

{
  "code": 275,
  "success": true,
  "total": 216,
  "message": "success"
}

22.12. 前台用户修改资金密码

URL: /api/user/updatePayPassword

Type: POST

Content-Type: application/x-www-form-urlencoded;charset=utf-8

Description: 前台用户修改资金密码

Query-parameters:

Parameter Type Description Required Since

password

string

No comments found.

false

-

newPassword

string

No comments found.

true

-

Request-example:

curl -X POST -i /api/user/updatePayPassword --data 'password=16k40h&newPassword=d8zy5q'

Response-fields:

Field Type Description Since

code

int32

结果编码

-

success

boolean

是否成功

-

data

object

结果数据

-

total

int32

总数量

-

message

string

请求错误信息

-

Response-example:

{
  "code": 375,
  "success": true,
  "total": 244,
  "message": "success"
}

22.13. 后台修改用户名

URL: /api/user/updateUsername

Type: POST

Content-Type: application/x-www-form-urlencoded;charset=utf-8

Description: 后台修改用户名

Query-parameters:

Parameter Type Description Required Since

userId

int64

No comments found.

true

-

username

string

No comments found.

true

-

Request-example:

curl -X POST -i /api/user/updateUsername --data 'username=sirena.block&userId=694'

Response-fields:

Field Type Description Since

code

int32

结果编码

-

success

boolean

是否成功

-

data

object

结果数据

-

total

int32

总数量

-

message

string

请求错误信息

-

Response-example:

{
  "code": 600,
  "success": true,
  "total": 64,
  "message": "success"
}

22.14. 用户修改邮箱

URL: /api/user/updateEmail

Type: POST

Content-Type: application/x-www-form-urlencoded;charset=utf-8

Description: 用户修改邮箱

Query-parameters:

Parameter Type Description Required Since

email

string

No comments found.

true

-

Request-example:

curl -X POST -i /api/user/updateEmail --data 'email=joan.bogan@yahoo.com'

Response-fields:

Field Type Description Since

code

int32

结果编码

-

success

boolean

是否成功

-

data

object

结果数据

-

total

int32

总数量

-

message

string

请求错误信息

-

Response-example:

{
  "code": 695,
  "success": true,
  "total": 880,
  "message": "success"
}

Parameter Type Description Required Since

companyId

int32

公司id

false

-

uniqueId

string

数据的唯一编码

false

-

mobile

string

手机号

false

-

email

string

邮箱

false

-

username

string

昵称

true

-

nickname

string

昵称

false

-

country

enum

国家(See: 国家)

false

-

mainCoinId

int32

用户的默认币种

false

-

password

string

密码

false

-

payPassword

string

支付密码

false

-

birthday

int32

生日

false

-

status

enum

状态(See: 用户状态枚举)

false

-

int64

上级用户Id

false

-

false

false

false

false

notRequireBet

boolean

false

boolean

false

-

folderId

int64

分类ID

false

-

memo

string

备注

false

-

Request-example:

curl -X POST -i /api/user/addUser --data 'nickname=bethanie.boyle&superUserId=347&mobile=1-641-937-2561&birthday=499&companyType=baowang&folderId=695&companyId=403&memo=gkk08v&agent=true&country=brazil&agentRoleId=543&status=enable&password=ugn2v9&test=true&advertiseAgent=true&payPassword=lfapcd&enableDiffCoinInvite=true&uniqueId=174&username=sirena.block&email=joan.bogan@yahoo.com¬RequireBet=true&mainCoinId=708'

Response-fields:

Field Type Description Since

code

int32

结果编码

-

success

boolean

是否成功

-

data

object

结果数据

-

total

int32

总数量

-

message

string

请求错误信息

  "success": true,
  "total": 446,
  "message": "success"

22.25. 根据条件修改用户状态，同时设置备注，每次只能操作一个数据节点，需要外层循环数据节点调用

URL: /api/user/batchUpdateStatusByCondition

Type: POST

Content-Type: application/x-www-form-urlencoded;charset=utf-8

Description: 根据条件修改用户状态，同时设置备注，每次只能操作一个数据节点，需要外层循环数据节点调用

Query-parameters:

Parameter Type Description Required Since

limit

int32

每页条数

false

-

page

int32

第几页

false

-

agentId

int64

代理id

false

-

lowLength

int32

下级级别

false

-

timeZone

enum

时区，报表不支持，仅数据列表，前端传minDay,maxDay,day支持(See: 时区枚举)

false

-

companyId

int32

公司id

false

-

userId

int64

用户id

false

-

test

boolean

是否是测试数据

false

-

username

string

用户名

false

-

email

string

邮箱

false

-

mobile

string

手机号

false

-

birthday

int32

生日

false

-

password

string

密码

false

-

minRegistTime

int64

最小注册时间戳

false

-

maxRegistTime

int64

最大注册时间戳

false

-

minFirstRechargeTime

int64

最小首冲时间戳

false

-

maxFirstRechargeTime

int64

最大首冲时间戳

false

-

minLastRechargeTime

int64

最小上次充值时间戳

false

-

maxLastRechargeTime

int64

最大上次充值时间戳

false

-

minActiveTime

int64

最小活跃时间戳

false

-

maxActiveTime

int64

最大活跃时间戳

false

-

minRetentionDays

int32

最小留存天数

false

-

status

enum

用户状态(See: 用户状态枚举)

false

-

online

boolean

是否在线

false

-

vipLevel

int32

用户VIP等级

false

-

minVipLevel

int32

最小用户VIP等级

false

-

agent

boolean

是否是代理

false

-

advertiseAgent

boolean

是否是广告代理

false

-

folderId

int64

用户分类id

false

-

registIp

string

注册IP

false

-

notRequireBet

boolean

是否是无打码要求用户

false

-

joinOfficialChannel

boolean

是否加入官方频道

false

-

joinBot

boolean

是否加入机器人

false

-

inviteCode

string

邀请码

false

-

userIds

array

用户id集合

false

-

companyIds

array

公司id集合

false

-

status

enum

enable -(已启用,enable)
disable -(已禁用,disable)

true

-

memo

string

No comments found.

false

-

Request-example:

curl -X POST -i /api/user/batchUpdateStatusByCondition --data 'lowLength=257&vipLevel=238&birthday=370&page=1&folderId=340¬RequireBet=true&test=true&minActiveTime=1782209243377&agent=true&minRegistTime=1782209243377&minRetentionDays=231&minVipLevel=141&maxFirstRechargeTime=1782209243377&companyId=76&username=sirena.block&mobile=1-641-937-2561&maxRegistTime=1782209243377&inviteCode=66040&timeZone=utc0&userId=91&joinBot=true&joinOfficialChannel=true&groupByColumns=m64adg&groupByColumns=m64adg&minFirstRechargeTime=1782209243377&status=enable&online=true&maxActiveTime=1782209243377&status=enable&password=485smq&email=joan.bogan@yahoo.com&advertiseAgent=true&countDistinctColumns=3fflqr&countDistinctColumns=3fflqr&agentId=209&minLastRechargeTime=1782209243377&maxLastRechargeTime=1782209243377&memo=vzyhy3®istIp=106.213.67.107&limit=10'

Response-fields:

Field Type Description Since

code

int32

结果编码

-

success

boolean

是否成功

-

data

object

结果数据

-

total

int32

总数量

-

message

string

请求错误信息

-

Response-example:

{
  "code": 19,
  "success": true,
  "total": 134,
  "message": "success"
}

22.27. 修改用户是否可以在某个场馆进行游戏

URL: /api/user/updateVenueEnable

Type: POST

Content-Type: application/x-www-form-urlencoded;charset=utf-8

Description: 修改用户是否可以在某个场馆进行游戏

Query-parameters:

Parameter Type Description Required Since

userId

int64

No comments found.

true

-

venue

enum

in_house -(0,In-house,in_house,true,false,false,false,null)
originals -(1,Funny Gaming,originals,true,false,false,false,null)
cq9 -(2,CQ9,cq9,false,true,false,false,com.jk.wg.venue.impls.cq9.CQ9RequestApi)
ka -(3,KA,ka,false,false,false,false,com.jk.wg.venue.impls.ka.KaRequestApi)
wm -(4,WM,wm,false,false,false,false,com.jk.wg.venue.impls.wm_live.WmRequestApi)
fb -(5,FB,fb,false,false,false,false,com.jk.wg.venue.impls.fb.FbSportRequestApi)
jili -(6,Jili,jili,false,false,false,false,com.jk.wg.venue.impls.jili_tada.JiliRequestApi)
pp -(7,PP,pp,false,false,false,false,com.jk.wg.venue.impls.pp.PpRequestApi)
pg -(8,PG,pg,false,false,false,false,com.jk.wg.venue.impls.pg.PgRequestApi)
fc -(9,FC,fc,false,false,false,false,com.jk.wg.venue.impls.fc.FcRequestApi)
evolution -(10,Evolution,evolution,false,false,false,false,com.jk.wg.venue.impls.evo.EvoRequestApi)
rt_nt_btg_nlc -(11,RedTiger/NetEnt/BTG/NolimitCity,rt_nt_btg,false,false,false,false,com.jk.wg.venue.impls.evo.RtNtBtgRequestApi)
jdb -(12,JDB,jdb,false,false,false,false,com.jk.wg.venue.impls.jdb.JdbRequestApi)
evo_play -(13,Evo Play,evo_play,false,false,false,false,com.jk.wg.venue.impls.evo_play.EvoPlayRequestApi)
gmag -(14,Gmag,gmag,false,false,false,true,com.jk.wg.venue.impls.gmag.GmAgRequestApi)
km -(15,KM,km,false,false,false,false,com.jk.wg.venue.impls.km.KmRequestApi)
awc -(16,AWC,awc,false,false,false,true,com.jk.wg.venue.impls.awc.AwcRequestApi)
panda_game -(17,Panda Game,panda_game,false,false,false,false,com.jk.wg.venue.impls.panda.PandaGameRequestApi)
tada -(18,Tada,tada,false,false,false,false,com.jk.wg.venue.impls.jili_tada.TadaRequestApi)
game_plus -(19,GamePlus,GamePlus,false,false,false,true,com.jk.wg.venue.impls.gamePlus.GamePlusRequestApi)
papago_game -(20,PapagoGame,PapagoGame,false,false,false,false,com.jk.wg.venue.impls.papagoGame.PapagoGameRequestApi)
ask_me_bet -(21,AskMeBet,AskMeBet,false,false,false,true,com.jk.wg.venue.impls.askmebet.AmbRequestApi)
cp_slots -(22,CP Game,CP Game,false,false,false,false,com.jk.wg.venue.impls.cp.CpRequestApi)
omg_slots -(23,OMG,omg,false,false,false,true,com.jk.wg.venue.impls.omg.OmgRequestApi)
predix -(24,predix,predix,false,false,false,false,com.jk.wg.venue.impls.predix.PredixRequestApi)
nex_game -(25,Nex Game,Nex Game,false,false,false,false,com.jk.wg.venue.impls.nexGame.NexGameRequestApi)
ag_game -(26,Ag Game,Ag Game,false,false,false,false,com.jk.wg.venue.impls.agGame.AgGameRequestApi)

true

-

enable

boolean

No comments found.

true

-

Request-example:

curl -X POST -i /api/user/updateVenueEnable --data 'userId=733&venue=in_house&enable=true'

Response-fields:

Field Type Description Since

code

int32

结果编码

-

success

boolean

是否成功

-

data

object

结果数据

-

total

int32

总数量

-

message

string

请求错误信息

-

Response-example:

{
  "code": 222,
  "success": true,
  "total": 863,
  "message": "success"
}

22.28. 获取防刷信息

URL: /api/user/getFangShua

Type: POST

Content-Type: application/x-www-form-urlencoded;charset=utf-8

Description: 获取防刷信息

Query-parameters:

Parameter Type Description Required Since

userId

int64

No comments found.

true

-

Request-example:

curl -X POST -i /api/user/getFangShua --data 'userId=964'

Response-fields:

Field Type Description Since

code

int32

结果编码

-

success

boolean

是否成功

-

data

object

结果数据

-

└─sameIps

int32

本人同IP数

-

└─superSameIps

int32

上线与本人同IP数

-

└─lowSameIps

int32

下线与本人同IP数

-

└─superSamePasswords

int32

上线与本人同密码数

-

└─lowSamePasswords

int32

下线与本人同密码数

-

└─superRechargeInfo

object

所有上线与本人充值信息

-

     └─firstRechargeUsers

int32

首冲人数

-

     └─repeatRechargeUsers

int32

复充人数

-

     └─firstRechargeActivityUsers

int32

参与首冲活动人数

-

└─lowRechargeInfos

array

所有下线充值信息

-

     └─lowLength

int32

下级级别

-

     └─agentLength

int32

代理级别

-

     └─firstRechargeUsers

int32

首冲人数

-

     └─firstRechargeActivityUsers

int32

参与首冲活动人数

-

     └─repeatRechargeUsers

int32

复充人数

-

total

int32

总数量

-

message

string

请求错误信息

-

Response-example:

{
  "code": 533,
  "success": true,
  "data": {
    "sameIps": 55,
    "superSameIps": 379,
    "lowSameIps": 692,
    "superSamePasswords": 931,
    "lowSamePasswords": 604,
    "superRechargeInfo": {
      "firstRechargeUsers": 993,
      "repeatRechargeUsers": 983,
      "firstRechargeActivityUsers": 50
    },
    "lowRechargeInfos": [
      {
        "lowLength": 109,
        "agentLength": 135,
        "firstRechargeUsers": 703,
        "firstRechargeActivityUsers": 190,
        "repeatRechargeUsers": 608
      }
    ]
  },
  "total": 676,
  "message": "success"
}

22.29. 前端查询用户的下级好友

URL: /api/user/queryReferral

Type: POST

Content-Type: application/x-www-form-urlencoded;charset=utf-8

Description: 前端查询用户的下级好友

Query-parameters:

Parameter Type Description Required Since

limit

int32

每页条数

false

-

page

int32

第几页

false

-

agentId

int64

代理id

false

-

lowLength

int32

下级级别

false

-

timeZone

enum

时区，报表不支持，仅数据列表，前端传minDay,maxDay,day支持(See: 时区枚举)

false

-

companyId

int32

公司id

false

-

userId

int64

用户id

false

-

Request-example:

curl -X POST -i /api/user/queryReferral --data 'companyId=846&lowLength=385&agentId=20&countDistinctColumns=ps53c1&countDistinctColumns=ps53c1&groupByColumns=hr6ra4&groupByColumns=hr6ra4&userId=308&page=1&timeZone=utc0&limit=10'

Response-fields:

Field Type Description Since

code

int32

结果编码

-

success

boolean

是否成功

-

data

array

结果数据

-

└─dataType

enum

数据类型编码(See: 批量同步数据类型)

-

└─targetDataNodeId

int32

数据的目标节点

-

└─coinId

int32

默认币种ID

-

└─coinType

enum

获取钱包类型(See: 币种类型)

-

└─coinName

string

获取币种名称

-

└─coinSymbol

string

获取币种符号

-

└─companyId

int32

所属公司id

-

└─userId

int64

所属用户

-

└─lowLength

int32

所属用户的几级下级级别

-

└─childId

int64

下级用户ID

-

└─avatar

string

下级用户的头像

-

└─username

string

用户名

-

└─nickname

string

昵称

-

└─country

enum

国家(See: 国家)

-

└─registTime

int64

注册时间

-

└─bet

number

所有币种累积下注(换算成美元)

-

└─recharge

number

所有币种累积充值(换算成美元)

-

total

int32

总数量

-

message

string

请求错误信息

-

Response-example:

{
  "code": 178,
  "success": true,
  "data": [
    {
      "dataType": "base_async",
      "targetDataNodeId": 595,
      "coinId": 34,
      "coinType": "fabi",
      "coinName": "sirena.block",
      "coinSymbol": "mctycb",
      "companyId": 121,
      "userId": 516,
      "lowLength": 275,
      "childId": 609,
      "avatar": "7l0rre",
      "username": "sirena.block",
      "nickname": "bethanie.boyle",
      "country": "brazil",
      "registTime": 1782209243377,
      "bet": 558,
      "recharge": 213
    }
  ],
  "total": 740,
  "message": "success"
}
